sourceEntity.description: The entity where this relationship starts (camelCase)

fieldName.description: The field name on the source entity representing this relationship (camelCase)

label.description: Human-readable label for this relationship, shown in the UI

targetEntity.description: The entity that this relationship points to (camelCase)

sourceCardinality.description: Type of relationship: one or many

targetCardinality.description: Type of relationship: one or many
